'''Beed Thane''' was the [[Archon (Vergill)|archon]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vergill]], a member of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]]. He insulted Ambassador [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] after she attempted to persuade the [[Hapan]]s to support the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in its war against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. He angered Prince [[Isolder]] who then challenged and defeated Thane in an [[honor duel]]. Following the duel, he was forced to pledge his planet's support for joining the war.

{{Char-stub}}
